title: RU to EN Translator
description: Russian to English and English to Russian Translator
body:
Hover over any Russian chat message and it'll translate it to English.
On long messages that has multiple lines, it hovers per line(except for the 1.1.1 version for 1.20.1).
I made this for fun, I don't plan on giving it other languages.
It doesn't have settings, maybe in the future.
